tools.Name: Pixelle-Video
tools.Description: An end-to-end automated framework for short video production.
tools.Use_Case: Generating complete short videos from a single prompt by orchestrating LLMs for scriptwriting, image generation, audio synthesis, and video assembly.

tools.Name: Local Deep Research
tools.Description: An agentic research tool designed for local privacy, supporting multiple LLM backends and various search engines.
tools.Use_Case: Conducting deep autonomous research across the web and private documents with citations and report synthesis, all kept locally and encrypted.

tools.Name: Maigret
tools.Description: A robust tool for collecting dossiers on individuals based solely on a username across 3000+ websites.
tools.Use_Case: Performing automated reconnaissance and gathering profile information for social media analysis and security research.
